reference_answer: Clerk Erin Moss received application A-18.
PR-18's initial status was pending completeness review.
It was assigned to the sanitation desk because the food-handling certificate was missing.
The sanitation desk corrected the missing-certificate flag from open to satisfied.
Hold notice H-2 superseded the approval after payment failed.
The applicant withdrew the request for weekend hours.
PR-18 was reopened for final issuance on 2026-01-18.
The current status is approved weekday renewal.
